title: astelia subulata
intro: Astelia subulata, also known as the Astelia or Grass Tree, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Astelia subulata include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a treatment for skin conditions and injuries.
